title: isertia alba
intro: Isertia alba, also known as White Isertia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Isertia alba include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Isertia alba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support immune function. Isertia alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including malaria and respiratory infections.
